scripts.start:frontend: cd chuan-bill-app && npm run dev && cd ..
scripts.lint:frontend: cd chuan-bill-app && npm run lint && cd ..
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:frontend:fix: cd chuan-bill-app && npm run lint:fix && cd ..
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:frontend:fix && npm run lint:backend:fix
